title: Motion Blur
description: A motion blur mod for Fabric, based on Satin API.
body:
# Motion Blur (Fabric)
Add motion blur shader to Minecraft, just like Lunar Client.

## Command
- /motionblur <percent>: to change the strength of blur

*__NOTICE:__ if you feel visual stutters when using this mod with sodium installed, please try setting _Video settings->advanced->CPU Render-Ahead Limit_ to __5 or above__

## Compatibility
sodium √
exordium √
feather client √
optifine x
